title: Poached Grape Leaf Delight
description: A salty and crumbly whole30-friendly Filipino dish featuring poached grape leaves that is a crowd-pleaser.
instructions: Wash grape leaves thoroughly and drain well.
In a small saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add garlic, sea salt, and ground black pepper. Stir until combined.
Gently submerge the grape leaves into the heated oil mixture in batches to avoid overcrowding the pan.
Cook for about 1-2 minutes per side or until fragrant and just slightly crisp.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before using as a whole30-friendly snack.
